data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁15
data.summary: [2/7(Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-gam
data.body:
[2/7(Tue) Ban Notice]
We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault and the transaction system.

▶ Total number of players banned: 3
▶ Period: Permanent
More details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/103294
